; Script generated by the Inno Setup Script Wizard.
#define MyAppName "Duoob"
#define MyAppVersion "1.0.2"
#define MyAppPublisher "RAK Properties PJSC"
#define MyAppURL "https://www.rakproperties.ae/"
#define MyAppExeName "duoob_desktop_app_v1.exe"
#define MyAppAssocName MyAppName + " File"
#define MyAppAssocExt ".myp"
#define MyAppAssocKey StringChange(MyAppAssocName, " ", "") + MyAppAssocExt

[Setup]
AppId={{F9EF0AD6-E943-45FC-BBAD-BC5A786831BE}
AppName={#MyAppName}
AppVersion={#MyAppVersion}
AppPublisher={#MyAppPublisher}
AppPublisherURL={#MyAppURL}
AppSupportURL={#MyAppURL}
AppUpdatesURL={#MyAppURL}
DefaultDirName={autopf}\{#MyAppName}
UninstallDisplayIcon={app}\{#MyAppExeName}
ArchitecturesAllowed=x64compatible
ArchitecturesInstallIn64BitMode=x64compatible
ChangesAssociations=yes
DisableProgramGroupPage=yes
; Required for WebView2 and VC Redist installation
PrivilegesRequired=admin 
OutputBaseFilename=DuoobSetup
SolidCompression=yes
WizardStyle=modern dynamic

[Languages]
Name: "english"; MessagesFile: "compiler:Default.isl"

[Tasks]
Name: "desktopicon"; Description: "{cm:CreateDesktopIcon}"; GroupDescription: "{cm:AdditionalIcons}"; Flags: unchecked

[Files]
; Main Flutter App Files
Source: "C:\Flutter\Projects\duoob_desktop_app_v1\build\windows\x64\runner\Release\*"; DestDir: "{app}"; Flags: ignoreversion recursesubdirs createallsubdirs
; Dependency Installers (Bundled for offline use)
Source: "C:\Users\DevUser\Downloads\VC_redist.x64.exe"; DestDir: "{tmp}"; Flags: deleteafterinstall
Source: "C:\Users\DevUser\Downloads\MicrosoftEdgeWebview2Setup.exe"; DestDir: "{tmp}"; Flags: deleteafterinstall

[Registry]
Root: HKA; Subkey: "Software\Classes\{#MyAppAssocExt}\OpenWithProgids"; ValueType: string; ValueName: "{#MyAppAssocKey}"; ValueData: ""; Flags: uninsdeletevalue
Root: HKA; Subkey: "Software\Classes\{#MyAppAssocKey}"; ValueType: string; ValueName: ""; ValueData: "{#MyAppAssocName}"; Flags: uninsdeletekey
Root: HKA; Subkey: "Software\Classes\{#MyAppAssocKey}\DefaultIcon"; ValueType: string; ValueName: ""; ValueData: "{app}\{#MyAppExeName},0"
Root: HKA; Subkey: "Software\Classes\{#MyAppAssocKey}\shell\open\command"; ValueType: string; ValueName: ""; ValueData: """{app}\{#MyAppExeName}"" ""%1"""

[Icons]
Name: "{autoprograms}\{#MyAppName}"; Filename: "{app}\{#MyAppExeName}"
Name: "{autodesktop}\{#MyAppName}"; Filename: "{app}\{#MyAppExeName}"; Tasks: desktopicon

[Run]
; 1. Install Visual C++ Redistributable
Filename: "{tmp}\vc_redist.x64.exe"; \
    Parameters: "/install /quiet /norestart"; \
    Check: VCRedistNeedsInstall; \
    StatusMsg: "Installing Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable..."

; 2. Install WebView2 Runtime (For WebView functionality)
Filename: "{tmp}\MicrosoftEdgeWebview2Setup.exe"; \
    Parameters: "/silent /install"; \
    Check: WebView2NeedsInstall; \
    StatusMsg: "Installing WebView2 Runtime (Required for Duoob)..."

; 3. Launch the app after installation
Filename: "{app}\{#MyAppExeName}"; \
    Description: "{cm:LaunchProgram,{#StringChange(MyAppName, '&', '&&')}}"; \
    Flags: nowait postinstall skipifsilent

[Code]
// Check if VC++ 2015-2022 Redistributable (x64) is installed
function VCRedistNeedsInstall: Boolean;
var
  Version: String;
begin
  if RegQueryStringValue(HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE,
     'SOFTWARE\Microsoft\VisualStudio\14.0\VC\Runtimes\x64',
     'Version', Version) then
    Result := False
  else
    Result := True;
end;

// Check if WebView2 Runtime is installed
function WebView2NeedsInstall: Boolean;
var
  Version: String;
begin
  // Check both 64-bit and 32-bit registry locations for WebView2
  if RegQueryStringValue(HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE, 'SOFTWARE\Microsoft\EdgeUpdate\Clients\{F3C4FE00-EFC5-4029-9883-F7394FCEC3E1}', 'pv', Version) then
    Result := False
  else if RegQueryStringValue(HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE, 'SOFTWARE\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\EdgeUpdate\Clients\{F3C4FE00-EFC5-4029-9883-F7394FCEC3E1}', 'pv', Version) then
    Result := False
  else
    Result := True;
end;
